crossRefs.label: Remove hub bearing unit and rear wheel sensor
Disconnect the headlight leveling sensor from the rear axle beam.
Headlight initial position learning (vehicles equipped with headlight leveling system)

blocks.text: Remove the parking brake cable (A) from the rear axle beam. Do not disconnect the parking brake cable.
Remove the brake pipe (A) and clip (B), and remove the brake hose (C) from the rear axle beam.

items: To prevent brake fluid from spilling out, the joints of the disconnected hoses must be covered with plugs or other means.
Do not allow brake fluid to adhere to painted surfaces. If it does adhere, wash it off with water immediately.
When installing, do not twist the brake hose forcibly.
When installing, replace the brake hose fixing clip with a new one.

blocks.text: 7. Remove hub bearing unit and rear wheel sensor

refs.label: Remove hub bearing unit and rear wheel sensor

blocks.text: Do not disconnect the wheel sensor cord.
Remove the brake assembly (A) from the axle beam.

items: Do not forcibly twist or strongly bend the parking brake cable. A deformed or damaged cable may cause malfunction or cut damage.
To prevent damage to other parts, the brake assembly should be secured with a wire or other means.

items.text: Do not forcibly twist or strongly bend the parking brake cable. A deformed or damaged cable may cause malfunction or cut damage.

blocks.text: 9. Headlight leveling sensor disconnection (vehicles equipped with headlight leveling system)
Disconnect the headlight leveling sensor from the rear axle beam.

refs.label: Disconnect the headlight leveling sensor from the rear axle beam.

blocks.text: Support the left and right spring lower seats (B) of the rear axle beam (A) with a jack. Remove the left and right rear axle beam mounting bolts (C), lower the jack and remove the rear axle beam from the vehicle body. When installing, replace the rear axle beam mounting bolts with new ones.

items: Do not apply a jack to the center of the rear axle beam (torsion beam).

blocks.text: Pay attention to the following items and install in the reverse order of removal.

items.text: For tightening the bushing part, tighten it to the specified torque with the vehicle weight applied after mounting it in a temporarily tightened condition.
For tightening the bushing part, tighten it to the specified torque with the vehicle weight applied after mounting it in a temporarily tightened condition.
After installing the wheel sensor cord, parking brake cable and brake hose, make sure there is no interference or kinking with other parts.
After installing the wheel sensor cord, parking brake cable and brake hose, make sure there is no interference or kinking with other parts.
Ensure that there is no interference between the brake pipe and the rear axle beam.
Ensure that there is no interference between the brake pipe and the rear axle beam.
